items.title: Greetings and Introductions
items.prompt: Practice greeting someone and introducing yourself in English.
items.hint: Use phrases like 'Hello', 'I'm [name]', and 'Nice to meet you'.
items.sample: Hello, I'm Pinocchio. Nice to meet you.

ja.prompt: 英語で誰かに挨拶して自己紹介を練習しましょう。
ja.hint: 'Hello', 'I'm [名前]', 'Nice to meet you' のフレーズを使いましょう。
ja.sample: Hello, I'm Pinocchio. Nice to meet you.

zh.prompt: 練習用英語問候和自我介紹。
zh.hint: 使用 'Hello', 'I'm [名字]', 'Nice to meet you' 等短語。
zh.sample: Hello, I'm Pinocchio. Nice to meet you.

items.title: Asking and Answering 'What's this?'
items.prompt: Ask about objects using 'What's this?' and answer with 'It's a ...'.
items.hint: Name common objects like book, box, pencil, eraser, ruler.

ja.prompt: 'What's this?' を使って物について質問し、'It's a ...' で答えましょう。
ja.hint: 本、箱、鉛筆、消しゴム、定規などの一般的な物の名前を使いましょう。

zh.prompt: 用 'What's this?' 詢問物品，並用 'It's a ...' 回答。
zh.hint: 說出常見物品如書、本、鉛筆、橡皮擦、尺子。

items.title: Telling Time
items.prompt: Practice asking and telling the time in English.
items.hint: Use 'What time is it?' and answer with 'It's [hour] o'clock' or '[hour]:[minutes]'.
items.sample: What time is it? It's 12 o'clock.

ja.prompt: 英語で時間を尋ねたり答えたりする練習をしましょう。
ja.hint: 'What time is it?' を使い、'It's [時間] o'clock' または '[時間]:[分]' で答えましょう。
ja.sample: What time is it? It's 12 o'clock.

zh.prompt: 練習用英語問時間和說時間。
zh.hint: 用 'What time is it?' 問，回答用 'It's [點] o'clock' 或 '[點]:[分]'。
zh.sample: What time is it? It's 12 o'clock.

items.title: Expressing Possession
items.prompt: Practice asking and answering about possession using 'Is this yours?' and 'Yes, it's mine' or 'No, it's not yours'.
items.hint: Use polite short answers to confirm or deny ownership.
items.sample: Is this yours? Yes, it's mine.

ja.prompt: 'Is this yours?' を使って所有を尋ね、'Yes, it's mine' または 'No, it's not yours' で答えましょう。
ja.hint: 丁寧な短い返事で所有を確認または否定しましょう。
ja.sample: Is this yours? Yes, it's mine.

zh.prompt: 練習用 'Is this yours?' 詢問物品是否屬於某人，回答用 'Yes, it's mine' 或 'No, it's not yours'。
zh.hint: 用禮貌的簡短回答確認或否認所有權。
zh.sample: Is this yours? Yes, it's mine.

items.title: Talking about Days and Food
items.prompt: Practice saying what day it is and talking about food you ate or want to eat.
items.hint: Use 'What day is it?', 'It's [day]', 'I had an [food] yesterday', and 'Wow, there's a [food]'.
items.sample: What day is it? It's Tuesday. I had an apple yesterday. Wow, there's an orange.

ja.prompt: 何曜日かを言ったり、食べたものや食べたいものについて話す練習をしましょう。
ja.hint: 'What day is it?', 'It's [曜日]', 'I had an [食べ物] yesterday', 'Wow, there's a [食べ物]' を使いましょう。
ja.sample: What day is it? It's Tuesday. I had an apple yesterday. Wow, there's an orange.

zh.prompt: 練習說今天星期幾，談論昨天吃的食物和看到的食物。
zh.hint: 用 'What day is it?', 'It's [星期]', 'I had an [食物] yesterday', 'Wow, there's a [食物]'。
zh.sample: What day is it? It's Tuesday. I had an apple yesterday. Wow, there's an orange.

items.title: Talking about Abilities
items.prompt: Practice asking and answering about abilities using 'Can you ...?' and 'Yes, I can' or 'No, I can't'.
items.hint: Use verbs like fly, dance, jump, swim, play the violin.
items.sample: Can you fly? No, I can't. Can you swim? Yes, I can.

ja.prompt: 'Can you ...?' を使って能力について尋ね、'Yes, I can' または 'No, I can't' で答えましょう。
ja.hint: fly, dance, jump, swim, play the violin などの動詞を使いましょう。
ja.sample: Can you fly? No, I can't. Can you swim? Yes, I can.

zh.prompt: 練習用 'Can you ...?' 詢問能力，回答用 'Yes, I can' 或 'No, I can't'。
zh.hint: 使用動詞如飛、跳舞、跳躍、游泳、拉小提琴。
zh.sample: Can you fly? No, I can't. Can you swim? Yes, I can.

items.title: Talking about Likes and Dislikes
items.prompt: Practice asking and answering about likes and dislikes using 'Do you like ...?' and 'Yes, I do' or 'No, I don't'.
items.hint: Talk about food or people using simple sentences.
items.sample: Do you like cheese? No, I don't. I like cheese.

ja.prompt: 'Do you like ...?' を使って好き嫌いを尋ね、'Yes, I do' または 'No, I don't' で答えましょう。
ja.hint: 食べ物や人について簡単な文で話しましょう。
ja.sample: Do you like cheese? No, I don't. I like cheese.

zh.prompt: 練習用 'Do you like ...?' 詢問喜好，回答用 'Yes, I do' 或 'No, I don't'。
zh.hint: 用簡單句子談論食物或人。
zh.sample: Do you like cheese? No, I don't. I like cheese.

items.title: Asking for and Giving Directions
items.prompt: Practice asking for directions and giving simple instructions.
items.hint: Use phrases like 'Excuse me, where is ...?', 'Go straight', 'Turn right'.
items.sample: Excuse me, where is the museum? Go straight and turn right.

ja.prompt: 道を尋ねたり、簡単な指示を出したりする練習をしましょう。
ja.hint: 'Excuse me, where is ...?', 'Go straight', 'Turn right' のフレーズを使いましょう。
ja.sample: Excuse me, where is the museum? Go straight and turn right.

zh.prompt: 練習問路和給簡單指示。
zh.hint: 使用 'Excuse me, where is ...?', 'Go straight', 'Turn right' 等短語。
zh.sample: Excuse me, where is the museum? Go straight and turn right.

items.title: Talking about Weather
items.prompt: Practice asking and talking about the weather using simple sentences.
items.hint: Use 'How is the weather?', 'It's raining', 'It's sunny', 'It's snowing'.
items.sample: How is the weather? It's raining. Oh no!

ja.prompt: 天気について尋ねたり話したりする練習をしましょう。
ja.hint: 'How is the weather?', 'It's raining', 'It's sunny', 'It's snowing' を使いましょう。
ja.sample: How is the weather? It's raining. Oh no!

zh.prompt: 練習問天氣和談論天氣。
zh.hint: 用 'How is the weather?', 'It's raining', 'It's sunny', 'It's snowing'。
zh.sample: How is the weather? It's raining. Oh no!

items.title: Expressing Gratitude and Politeness
items.prompt: Practice saying 'Thank you' and responding with 'You're welcome'.
items.hint: Use polite expressions after receiving something or help.

ja.prompt: 'Thank you' と言い、'You're welcome' で返事をする練習をしましょう。
ja.hint: 何かをもらったり助けてもらった後に丁寧な表現を使いましょう。

zh.prompt: 練習說 'Thank you' 並用 'You're welcome' 回應。
zh.hint: 收到東西或幫助後使用禮貌用語。
